text:
Kurapika × Friends × End of Spiders (クラピカ×仲間×クモの最期, Kurapika × Nakama × Kumo no Saigo) is the 62 nd and the last episode of the original Hunter × Hunter anime. It first aired on March 31 st , 2001.

Overview

Zeno and Silva fight Chrollo, but don't kill him after Illumi calls them, having killed the mafia Dons. With no clients, there's no reason to fight and they leave. Fake dead bodies of the Phantom Troupe are found, calming the mafia community, and the auction takes place as planned. Kurapika meets with Gon, Killua, and Leorio. Hisoka sends a text to Kurapika telling him that the corpses are fake.

Synopsis

Before their battle starts, Silva warns his father about their opponent ability on stealing other people abilities. As they clash Chrollo keeps on dodging the attacks from Zeno and Silva, a few hits were landed by Zeno and manages to drop and push Chrollo back using his ability, Silva follows through, but Chrollo pulls out a knife and successfully cuts a small portion of Silva's hand. Silva immediately recognize the knife, it was a knife that contains toxins that can paralyze an elephant. As Silva removes the toxins, Zeno on the other hand evaluates the pros and cons of Chrollo stealing ability and came up with an idea that Chrollo needs to complete a certain conditions before he can successfully steal the ability. After listening to Zeno's conclusion, Chrollo left with no choice but to use his Nen ability, Zeno, advises Silva to take matter on his own hands by killing Chrollo even at the cost of Zeno's life. Upon approaching Chrollo, Zeno preparing his attack, Chrollo uses his own ability by pulling out a conjured cloak from his book. Zeno being cautious lashes out his technique and aims towards Chrollo while trying to hit Chrollo, Zeno made a further conclusion about Chrollo's ability by keeping him at a distance to avoid the cloak and then striking him at the right time. Watching closely, Silva is amaze on how Chrollo's awareness of him while dodging Zeno's attack at the same time. Thus, he believed that in order for them to take him down they needed to sacrifice themselves in order to do so. Silva charges his power distracting Chrollo then Zeno manages to caught Chrollo in his technique and draws closer on him and launches a barrage of attacks then orders Zeno to kill him and Silva launches his power towards them that trembles the whole building.

Shortly, a live video on feed was shown and a member of the Ten Dons announces the death of Chrollo by the hands of the professional assassins and informing that the auction will resume. Unbeknownst to them, all of the Ten Dons were assassinated by Illumi, controlling the corpse to manipulate the audience. It was revealed that Chrollo hired Illumi to kill the Ten Dons and with this turn of events Zeno informs Chrollo that they don't have anymore reasons to kill him since the Ten Dons are their client and now were dead. A brief discussion is held by Chrollo and Zeno in regards on who with win if they fight one on one. Shortly after Silva and Zeno departs, Chrollo is disappointed that he could not steal their Nen abilities.

The Underground Auction continues, but the Phantom Troupe as part of their plan takes over the event and they auction items which are replicas created from Kortopi's Nen ability. Kurapika on the other other hand was informed that the auction continues and that the leader of the Phantom Troupe were killed then he investigates the area and discovers the fake corpse of Chrollo, confirming his death. Other fake corpse from the members of the Phantom Troupe are found. Later on, Kurapika informs his boss that the auction is resuming then Light insists Kurapika to bid and obtain for the Kurta Clan Scarlet Eyes. After the bidding war ends Kurapika won the bidding.

Killua, Leorio, and Gon were seen looking for Kurapika. After Kurapika delivered the item to his colleagues, he later roams around the city while remembering his conversation with Gon about them joining him taking the Troupe which is not an option now since he thought that they are dead. Gon, Killua, Kurapika reunited at the a park then shortly Leorio joins. Kurapika then receives a message from Hisoka that the corpses were fake.
